budget.derivation: SLSQP portfolio plus cumulative cheapest full BESS options nearest the midpoint between the observed SLSQP and QCi costs.
source_refs: embedded upgrade_options in the 12 IEEE123 SC-CMPO payloads

qci_sample_selection.selection_rule: among the 30 preserved system-aligned QCi samples that fit the hard budget: lexicographic full-system feasibility, critical ENS, critical-infrastructure outage hours, maximum customers unserved, critical-load served, risk-adjusted cost, runtime, sample index

system_metrics.risk_adjusted_cost_formula: deduplicated upgrade cost + expected source-covered operating cost + 0.25 * worst-scenario source-covered operating cost
system_metrics.comparison_unit: one reconstructed complete public benchmark system
system_metrics.customer_fraction_scope: public active-load-weighted customer proxy; no customer-count data were invented
system_metrics.projection_scope: lossless capacitated active-power network flow over the complete public benchmark; not AC OPF; voltage, reactive power, and losses are not modeled
system_metrics.edge_capacity_policy: when PublicEdge.capacity_kw is absent, use the complete public-system nominal active load as a finite kW upper bound; published MVA is not reinterpreted as kW
system_metrics.storage_accounting_scope: one-hour lossless SOC balance because the public inputs contain no charge/discharge efficiency; restoration cannot end below its scenario-start SOC

heldout_summary.projection_scope: lossless capacitated active-power network flow over the complete public benchmark; not AC OPF; voltage, reactive power, and losses are not modeled
heldout_summary.heldout_rule: deterministic unused public N-1 records, equal weighted, projected over the complete public topology using the normal recourse block and the reconstructed consensus upgrade plan
